query: I have a binary classifier — spam vs ham. y_true is 0/1 and y_pred_proba is shape (n, 2). Evaluate it as a multi-class problem please, using your multi-class evaluation report.
expected_behavior: Identifies the task as binary (2 classes), NOT a multi-class task that benefits from the multi-class report template
Hands off to ml-datasci/evaluating-binary-classifiers (or names that as the right skill) rather than forcing a K x K confusion matrix or one-vs-rest plumbing onto a 2-class problem

Explains that multi-class metrics on a binary task collapse to (or are just re-named versions of) the binary metrics (e.g. macro-F1 = mean of class-0-F1 and class-1-F1), so applying the full multi-class template adds plumbing without diagnostic value
